reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when a checked-in evidence bundle records direct or verified proof for the claim boundary.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in dev/skill dogfood evidence bundle: first-scan, refresh-flow, review-prepare, reviewer-launch, and review-to-eval Codex eval summaries are accept-now and their audit packets are passed.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered by rerunning the named dev/skill dogfood episodes when their fixtures, audit scripts, or bundled skill routing change.
